properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I thought that I had crossed the line Walked away from love one time Too many I thought I'd used up all the grace Set aside for my mistakes So many

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: On my knees I found to my surprise That your mercy renewed with the sunrise

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord make Your mercy new every day You change my life in so many ways You cradle me in Your sweet grace You fill me Yesterday, today, forever more There's one thing I know for sure Fresh as the morning dew You make Your mercy new Every morning

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh the wasted times that I have known A prodigal away from home Not knowing Every day Your grace was multiplied With forgiveness waiting to provide

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You make Your mercy new every day You change my life in so many ways You cradle me in Your sweet grace You fill me Yesterday, today, forever more There's one thing I know for sure Fresh as the morning dew You make Your mercy new Every morning

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: To save the entire world How much grace would it take When the sun comes up There will be enough
